actions.instruction: Click the "Sign in with Google" button
actions.description: Click the 'Sign in with Google' button to initiate the OAuth flow

actions.instruction: Verify the browser navigates to a Google OAuth consent URL or shows an OAuth popup
actions.description: The step cannot be mapped to a known action as it requires verification of navigation or popup behavior which is not directly executable.

actions.instruction: Verify the URL contains "accounts.google.com" or the configured OAuth callback
actions.description: Verify the current browser URL contains 'accounts.google.com' or the configured OAuth callback
